creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Apologies for the slow response. 

(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #1)

> your system

helloSystem? 

Certainly I can make the suggestion, but I wondered whether the port (here) would benefit from the change. For all users of the port to have a standard, more predictable shortcut. 

If it's out of scope – if you'd prefer to remain true to upstream – that's fine, you can close this bug.
